name: health-web-workspace
description: 统一门户 + 用户/医生/管理子应用，本地一键并行启动

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix portal && npm install --prefix sanyuan-user && npm install --prefix doctor && npm install --prefix administrator
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n portal,user,doctor,admin -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev --prefix portal" "npm run dev --prefix sanyuan-user" "npm run dev --prefix doctor" "npm run dev --prefix administrator"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix portal && npm run build --prefix sanyuan-user && npm run build --prefix doctor && npm run build --prefix administrator
